name: blue-archive-quiz
description: Fan-made Blue Archive quiz web app with Supabase and Cloudflare Pages integration.

scripts.check: node -c script.js && node -c scripts/build-cloudflare-pages.js && node -c scripts/build-single-html.js
scripts.deploy:pages: npx wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name blue-archive-quiz --branch production --commit-dirty=true
